scripts.build:preview: npm run preview:config && PERMITPULSE_WRANGLER_CONFIG=.wrangler.preview.jsonc CLOUDFLARE_ENV=preview vite build
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run verify:os && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate:preview: npm run preview:config && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env preview --remote --config .wrangler.preview.jsonc --no-x-provision
scripts.db:migrate:preview:list: npm run preview:config && wrangler d1 migrations list DB --env preview --remote --config .wrangler.preview.jsonc --no-x-provision
scripts.deploy:preview:first: npm run preflight:preview:secret-file && npm run build:preview && npm run preflight:preview:resolved && wrangler deploy --config dist/permitpulse_case_workspace/wrangler.json --secrets-file /tmp/permitpulse-preview-secrets.env --no-x-provision --no-autoconfig --strict
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build:preview && npm run preflight:preview:resolved && wrangler deploy --config dist/permitpulse_case_workspace/wrangler.json --no-x-provision --no-autoconfig --strict
